name: Marinated Chicken Breasts with Mozzarella
recipeIngredient: 6 oz pkg long grain and wild rice pilaf mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the rice pilaf according to package directions, adding green onions for the last 5 minutes of cooking.
2. In a saucepan, bring 1/2 cup water to boiling. Add broccoli florets and cook, covered, for 3 minutes or until crisp-tender. Drain and set aside.
3. Heat olive oil in a large, cast-iron skillet over medium heat. Cook chicken breasts for 8-10 minutes or until no longer pink, turning once.
4. Place halved tomato slices on top of the chicken breasts and cover each with half-slice of mozzarella cheese.
5. Broil the chicken breasts 3-4 inches from the heat for 1 minute or until cheese is melted and bubbly.
6. Serve hot over rice pilaf.
